paragraphs: Good momentum — overdue count is down to 16. Well below the 7-day average of 20 — the team is making real progress. 50 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. 4 projects cleared their overdue lists — well done.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 5. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Down to 2 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Ginger Brown:** **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.
**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** **17 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 10 payment tasks due this week.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.
**Angel Pacheco:** Down to 3 overdue — making progress.
**Milagros Porturas:** Down to 3 overdue — making progress.

261 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **91 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 8 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 36 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Katie Holmes & Sean Springs and Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 3. Keep the momentum going.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Down to 2 overdue — good. Close them out today. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 28 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 49 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Clean — 9 tasks in progress. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 31 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 3 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 7. Keep the momentum going.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 7 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **10 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 42 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** **4 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** Clean — 8 tasks in progress. **17 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 33 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 3. Keep the momentum going.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 5 overdue — oldest first. **14 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** Clean — 6 tasks in progress. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. 2 payment tasks need Operations attention. **11 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 28 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Clean — 2 tasks in progress. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 3 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
